_comment: Example ianva upstream set. Copy to ~/.config/ianva/upstreams.json and edit, or let build-mcp-registry.py populate ~/.agents/mcp/servers.json. ianva merges both (this file wins on name collisions). stdio upstreams give {command,args,env}; remote upstreams give {url,type} and oauth:true when MCPHub should hold + auto-refresh their OAuth.
_comment_claude_ai_class: The remote OAuth upstreams below are the claude.ai-connector class — each shows '! Needs authentication' in `claude mcp list` because claude.ai runs its OAuth from Anthropic's cloud, the exact re-auth disease the public ianva face (lever L-IANVA-CLOUD / issue #263) replaces with ONE bearer'd connector. Any new claude.ai connector that needs auth belongs here, not in a chat.
